creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #25)
It seems that on a host with /usr/lib32, gcc7 built with this patch produces 32bit binaries that run:

# gcc7 -o hello -m32 hello.c
# file hello
hello: ELF 32-bit MSB executable, PowerPC or cisco 4500, version 1 (FreeBSD), dynamically linked, interpreter /libexec/ld-elf.so.1, FreeBSD-style, for FreeBSD 13.0 (1300004), with debug_info, not stripped
# ./hello 
hello, world
#

At least with trivial code, it works!
